title: Phase 4 Intervention Probe (Pause, Resume, Abort)
summary: This feature ships a bounded Phase 4 intervention probe that captures empirical pause, resume, and abort evidence while the run sits at live plan, then records matching run.log.jsonl event ids in pause-resume-abort-evidence.json.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
